fixesApplied.description: Replaced neon-green hover/active color with accent color on nav items and sub-items

HeaderMainSubItem.tsx: Changed 'hover:text-neon-green' to 'hover:text-accent' on sub-item link
HeaderMainSubItem.php: Changed 'hover:text-neon-green' to 'hover:text-accent' on sub-item ThemeLink className

fixesApplied.description: Added hover effect (opacity transition) to CTA (SEP) link on desktop and mobile

fixesApplied.description: Fixed search icon, placeholder, and content not showing in PHP frontend
changes: Added 'text-white' to both desktop and mobile search submit button classes so SVG currentColor renders white on dark background
Wrapped theme_block_asset('SearchIcon.svg') in <span class='w-[19.2px] h-[19.2px] block'> to match TSX sizing
Added 'text-white' to mobile toggle button for consistent SVG rendering
Fixed Windows CRLF line endings to Unix LF in HeaderMain.php, HeaderMainItem.php, HeaderMainSubItem.php, Header.php
